hero_subtitle: — The sky is no limit, we open the ways —
divisions_subtitle: From air travel to cargo and education — every UFLY division is built on trust, precision, and passion for serving our people.
div1_desc: Premium flight booking, ticketing, and travel concierge services connecting Kurdistan to the world.
div2_desc: International freight, customs clearance, and logistics solutions for businesses and individuals.
div3_desc: Study abroad programs, language courses, and educational consultancy for students worldwide.
about_p1: UFLY Travel has been a cornerstone of the travel and logistics industry in Kurdistan since 2015. We are more than a travel agency — we are a gateway connecting people, businesses, and dreams across borders.
about_p2: With offices spanning every major city in the Kurdistan Region — Duhok, Erbil, Sulaymaniyah — and a growing international network, our team of passionate professionals delivers personalized service with integrity, speed, and care.
services_subtitle: Six services across three divisions — each designed with one mission: to make your experience seamless, safe, and exceptional.
service1_quote: "Your journey begins with the right ticket"
service1_desc: Comprehensive flight booking services covering domestic routes across Iraq and international destinations. We partner with major airlines to offer competitive fares, flexible schedules, and personalized travel planning.
service2_quote: "We handle the paperwork, you enjoy the journey"
service2_desc: Complete visa processing and travel documentation services. Our experienced team navigates the complexities of international travel requirements so you don't have to.
service3_quote: "Every destination tells a story — let us write yours"
service3_desc: Curated travel packages including Umrah/Hajj pilgrimages, European tours, medical tourism, and family holiday packages.
service4_quote: "Shipping is not just moving boxes — it's delivering trust"
service4_desc: International freight forwarding, customs clearance, and door-to-door delivery services. Whether personal effects or commercial shipments, our logistics network ensures your cargo arrives safely and on time.
service5_desc: Comprehensive study abroad consultancy helping students find the right programs, universities, and destinations worldwide.
service6_quote: "A new language is a new window to the world"
service6_desc: Language learning programs for students and professionals. We offer English, Turkish, German, and Arabic courses at various levels.
partners_subtitle: We collaborate with leading airlines, educational institutions, and logistics providers to deliver excellence at every step.
contact_subtitle: Ready to start your journey? Reach out to us — we're here 24/7 to help with bookings, inquiries, or anything you need.
contact_info_text: Our team is ready to welcome you at any of our locations across the Kurdistan Region. Drop by, call, or send us a message and we'll get back to you within minutes.
form_message_placeholder: Tell us about your travel plans...
footer_desc: Your trusted partner for air travel, cargo, and education services across Kurdistan and the world. Since 2015.
footer_follow_desc: Stay connected for travel tips, offers, and updates.
